files.module_doc: HamHatApp — main application window.

classes.name: HamHatApp
classes.doc: Main application window — thin coordinator between engine and tabs.

methods.name: display_cfg
methods.doc: Return the active DisplayConfig for this session.

methods.name: _check_linux_permissions
methods.doc: On Linux/RPi, warn if the user is missing required OS group memberships.

methods.name: _on_tab_changed
methods.doc: Auto-start RX monitor when APRS Comms tab is selected (if Always-on is set).

methods.name: _hw_mode
methods.doc: Return current hardware mode.

methods.name: on_hw_mode_changed
methods.doc: Reset the footer connection indicator when the hardware mode selector changes.

methods.name: connect
methods.doc: Connect to SA818 on given port (called from main thread).

methods.name: scan_ports
methods.doc: Return list of available serial port names (called on main thread).

methods.name: auto_identify_and_connect
methods.doc: Probe COM ports. SA818 mode: connect to first SA818. DigiRig mode: find non-SA818 port.

methods.name: apply_radio
methods.doc: Read radio params from main tab and apply to SA818.

methods.name: refresh_audio_devices
methods.doc: Called from MainTab to refresh device lists.

methods.name: send_aprs_message
methods.doc: Send direct APRS message. When called with no args reads from tab vars.

methods.name: send_direct_message
methods.doc: Alias used by CommsTab.

methods.name: send_aprs_position
methods.doc: Read lat/lon/comment from APRS tab vars and send position.

methods.name: apply_os_rx_level
methods.doc: Read OS mic level from APRS tab var and apply.

methods.name: on_rx_auto_toggle
methods.doc: Called when the 'Always-on RX Monitor' checkbox is toggled.

methods.name: rx_one_shot
methods.doc: One-shot RX decode — alias for APRS tab button.

methods.name: aprs_log
methods.doc: Log a message to the APRS monitor (called from tab callbacks).

methods.name: tx_channel_sweep
methods.doc: Run TX channel sweep to help find the correct audio routing.

methods.name: auto_detect_rx
methods.doc: Capture a short audio sample and suggest OS mic level.

methods.name: _handle_packet
methods.doc: Process a received APRS packet on the main thread.

methods.name: _handle_mesh_packet
methods.doc: Process a received mesh packet (called on main thread, errors must not propagate).

methods.name: _mesh_tx
methods.doc: Send a mesh payload string over the APRS TX path (fire and forget).

methods.name: mesh_discover
methods.doc: Initiate route discovery to target (called from MeshTab).

methods.name: mesh_send
methods.doc: Send mesh DATA to dst (called from MeshTab).

methods.name: mesh_apply_config
methods.doc: Push current mesh Tk vars into MeshManager config.

methods.name: save_profile
methods.doc: Collect profile from all tabs and save.

methods.name: import_profile
methods.doc: Open a file dialog and apply the chosen profile (called from MainTab button).

methods.name: export_profile
methods.doc: Collect current profile and save it to a user-chosen file (called from MainTab button).

methods.name: _get_current_profile
methods.doc: Collect a lightweight snapshot for engine calls.

methods.name: _pakt_tx_timeout_tick
methods.doc: Expire PAKT outbound messages that never received a tx_result.

methods.name: _mesh_tick
methods.doc: Periodic mesh housekeeping (HELLO, route expiry).

methods.name: _apply_os_tx_level
methods.doc: Set the SA818 USB playback device to `level` % in Windows.

methods.name: refresh_ports
methods.doc: Refresh COM port list in the port combobox (main thread).

methods.name: auto_identify
methods.doc: Auto-identify SA818 — alias matching MainTab button command.

methods.name: pakt_send_tx_request
methods.doc: Validate and submit a PAKT TX request. Returns True if submitted, False on any pre-flight failure.

files.module_doc: AppState — shared application state (tk.Var containers + engine instances).

classes.name: AppState
classes.doc: A container for shared application state.

files.module_doc: AprsEngine: manages APRS TX, RX monitor, and reliable messaging.

classes.name: AprsEngine
classes.doc: Encapsulates all APRS TX/RX workflow logic.

methods.name: send_payload
methods.doc: Fire-and-forget: launches a worker thread for TX.

methods.name: send_payload_blocking
methods.doc: Blocking TX — call only from a worker thread.

methods.name: _do_tx
methods.doc: Prepare radio, play APRS WAV, restore radio config.

methods.name: _do_tx_digirig
methods.doc: DigiRig TX path: no SA818 radio control; PTT via transient serial RTS.

methods.name: send_reliable
methods.doc: Fire-and-forget reliable TX with ACK wait.

methods.name: _rx_loop
methods.doc: Capture-only loop. Immediately submits each chunk to the decode queue so there is zero dead time between consecutive captures.

methods.name: _decode_loop
methods.doc: Background decode worker. Runs asynchronously so capture is never blocked waiting for the AFSK discriminator / HDLC search to finish.

methods.name: handle_received_packet
methods.doc: Process a received packet. Returns a dict of parsed fields for UI, or None. Also triggers auto-ACK if needed.

methods.name: _dispatch_auto_ack
methods.doc: Send ACK in a short-lived thread so it doesn't block RX capture.

files.module_doc: APRS payload helpers and AX.25/AFSK modem.

functions.name: afsk_from_nrzi
functions.doc: Fully vectorized AFSK encoder (single np.sin call). Returns 16-bit PCM mono bytes.

functions.name: write_test_tone_wav
functions.doc: Vectorized test tone generator.

functions.name: split_text_for_group
functions.doc: Split text into chunks that fit inside group wire payloads.

functions.name: split_aprs_text_chunks
functions.doc: Split plain text into chunks for direct messaging.

functions.name: parse_aprs_message_info
functions.doc: Return (addressee, text, msg_id_or_None) or None.

functions.name: parse_aprs_position_info
functions.doc: Return (lat, lon, comment) for uncompressed, compressed, and Mic-E APRS positions.

functions.name: _parse_compressed_position
functions.doc: Parse base-91 compressed APRS position from the payload (after DTI/timestamp).

functions.name: _mic_e_digit_flag
functions.doc: Return (digit, flag) for a Mic-E destination character.

functions.name: _parse_mice_position
functions.doc: Decode Mic-E position from destination address + info field.

files.module_doc: AudioRouter: device selection, PTT integration, and playback management.

classes.name: AudioRouter
classes.doc: Manages output/input device selection, PTT keying, and audio playback.

methods.name: auto_select_usb_pair
methods.doc: Try to find matching USB audio device pair.

methods.name: play_with_ptt_blocking
methods.doc: Play WAV with PTT keying. Blocks until done. Must run in worker thread.

methods.name: capture_compatible
methods.doc: Capture audio. On Windows from a non-main thread uses a subprocess.

methods.name: record_compatible
methods.doc: Record WAV. On Windows from a non-main thread uses a subprocess.

files.module_doc: Audio I/O helpers for playback, recording, and device enumeration.

functions.name: _list_devices
functions.doc: Enumerate audio devices filtered by direction ('input' or 'output').

functions.name: play_wav
functions.doc: Non-blocking WAV playback. Stops any current playback first.

functions.name: play_wav_blocking
functions.doc: Blocking WAV playback.

functions.name: play_wav_blocking_compatible
functions.doc: Blocking playback with device-compatible resampling (mono, device sample rate).

functions.name: record_wav
functions.doc: Record mono 16-bit WAV from selected input device (blocking).

functions.name: capture_samples
functions.doc: Capture mono float32 samples. Returns (sample_rate, float32_array).

functions.name: estimate_wav_level
functions.doc: Return a normalised RMS level 0..1 for visualiser gain estimation.

files.module_doc: CommsManager: contacts, groups, and chat thread logic.

functions.name: _norm_call
functions.doc: Normalise a callsign to uppercase stripped form.

classes.name: CommsManager
classes.doc: Manages contacts, groups, chat history, and heard stations.

methods.name: mark_delivered
methods.doc: Mark the most-recent TX message with this msg_id as delivered.

methods.name: mark_pakt_tx_result
methods.doc: Apply a PAKT tx_result update to the matching outbound message.

methods.name: expire_stale_pakt_tx
methods.doc: Mark stale pending PAKT outbound messages as failed.

methods.name: build_direct_chunks
methods.doc: Split text for direct APRS messaging.

methods.name: build_group_chunks
methods.doc: Split text into group wire-format chunks (prefix overhead accounted).

methods.name: infer_thread_key
methods.doc: Return the thread key for a given packet, matching v1 logic.

files.module_doc: DisplayConfig — cross-platform display/font configuration helper.

functions.name: _resolve_mono_font
functions.doc: Return the best available monospace font name for the current platform.

functions.name: _resolve_ui_font
functions.doc: Return the best available proportional UI font for the current platform.

classes.name: DisplayConfig
classes.doc: All display/layout parameters for a single deployment target.

methods.name: default
methods.doc: Default configuration — no overrides, desktop window manager decides.

methods.name: rpi_720p
methods.doc: Optimized for a 5-inch 1280×720 16:9 screen on Raspberry Pi.

methods.name: from_args
methods.doc: Build a DisplayConfig from command-line arguments.

methods.name: apply_to_root
methods.doc: Apply this config to the root Tk window.

files.module_doc: MeshManager — APRS AX.25 Mesh (Test) layer v0.

functions.name: parse_mesh_payload
functions.doc: Parse an APRS text payload into a MeshPacket, or return None on failure.

functions.name: build_mesh_payload
functions.doc: Serialise a MeshPacket to its APRS text payload string.

functions.name: _chunk_body
functions.doc: Split encoded body into chunks of at most max_bytes chars.

classes.name: MeshManager
classes.doc: Application-layer mesh manager over APRS text payloads.

methods.name: get_route
methods.doc: Return the live route for *destination*, or None if not found.

methods.name: toggle_pin
methods.doc: Toggle pinned state for *destination*. Returns new pinned value, or None if no route.

methods.name: discover_route
methods.doc: Initiate route discovery to *target*; return list of outbound packets.

methods.name: send_data
methods.doc: Build DATA packet(s) for *body* to *dst*; chunks if needed.

methods.name: handle_rx
methods.doc: Process an incoming mesh payload.

methods.name: _can_forward
methods.doc: True only when this node is configured as a REPEATER.

methods.name: tick
methods.doc: Scheduled tick: emit HELLO if enabled, expire stale state.

methods.name: _write_chunked
methods.doc: Write payload in chunks. Returns True on success, False on any failure.

methods.name: _create_reconnect_task

files.module_doc: Platform-aware application data directory resolution.

functions.name: get_user_data_dir

files.module_doc: ProfileManager: validated load/save of AppProfile to JSON.
RadioController: thread-safe radio state manager with save/restore.

methods.name: probe_and_connect
methods.doc: Probe port; if SA818 found, connect and return (True, version).

methods.name: apply_config
methods.doc: Apply radio config and remember it as current.

methods.name: push_config
methods.doc: Push current config onto the stack, then apply cfg.

methods.name: pop_config
methods.doc: Restore most recently pushed config (LIFO). Returns reply or None if stack empty.

methods.name: release_ptt
methods.doc: Release PTT without raising.

files.module_doc: SA818 serial control backend.

methods.name: probe
methods.doc: Try to connect to port; return (success, version_or_error).

methods.name: _command
methods.doc: Send AT command and return stripped reply. Must hold _io_lock.

methods.name: command
methods.doc: Public command interface (thread-safe).

methods.name: _release_ptt_safe
methods.doc: Release PTT without raising. Call before closing port.

methods.name: _safe_modem_lines
methods.doc: Force DTR/RTS low so control lines cannot accidentally key PTT.

files.module_doc: TileProvider — OSM slippy-map tile cache (online + offline).

functions.name: lat_lon_to_tile
functions.doc: Return OSM tile (x, y) containing the given lat/lon at zoom z.

functions.name: lat_lon_to_world_px
functions.doc: Return world-pixel coordinates from top-left at zoom z (tile_size=256).

functions.name: world_px_to_lat_lon
functions.doc: Inverse of lat_lon_to_world_px.

classes.name: TileProvider
classes.doc: Fetch, cache (memory + disk), and serve OSM slippy-map tiles.

methods.name: pil_available
methods.doc: True if Pillow is installed (tile rendering possible).

methods.name: get_tile
methods.doc: Return tile image immediately from memory or disk cache, or None.

methods.name: request_tile
methods.doc: Non-blocking: fetch tile in background; call on_ready() when done.

methods.name: tile_count_for_region
methods.doc: Estimate the number of tiles needed to cover a region.

methods.name: download_region
methods.doc: Download all tiles for a region synchronously.

methods.name: cached_tile_count
methods.doc: Count tiles currently on disk.

methods.name: clear_disk_cache
methods.doc: Delete all cached tiles from disk.

files.module_doc: APRS Tab — TX, RX monitor, position, and map.

methods.name: append_log
methods.doc: Append a line to the APRS monitor log (alias for aprs_log).

methods.name: set_monitor_active
methods.doc: Update the RX monitor status indicator label.

methods.name: set_input_level
methods.doc: Update input level indicator (separate from clip).

methods.name: set_output_level
methods.doc: Update TX level (currently just logged, could drive a meter).

methods.name: push_waterfall
methods.doc: Feed audio samples to the waterfall widget if present.

methods.name: set_rx_clip
methods.doc: Show RX clip percentage in the clip label.

files.module_doc: CommsTab — Merged APRS Comms tab.

classes.name: CommsTab
classes.doc: Merged APRS Comms tab — source/monitor controls, contacts, map, chat, log.

methods.name: _activate_thread
methods.doc: Set the active thread and load its messages.

methods.name: _render_message
methods.doc: Append a message in chat-bubble style: TX right, RX left.

methods.name: _on_compose_enter
methods.doc: Send on Enter (not Shift+Enter).

methods.name: _send_message
methods.doc: Send to the currently active thread (contact or group).

methods.name: _on_msg_log_resize
methods.doc: Keep bubble margins proportional when the message area is resized.

methods.name: on_message
methods.doc: Called when a new message arrives (on main thread via after()).

methods.name: on_delivered
methods.doc: Called when a TX message in thread_key receives its ACK.

methods.name: on_message_updated
methods.doc: Reload the active thread after a delivery-state change.

methods.name: refresh_contacts
methods.doc: Rebuild contacts and group listboxes, highlighting active thread and unread.

methods.name: refresh_heard
methods.doc: Rebuild heard-stations list, highlighting active thread and unread.

methods.name: append_log
methods.doc: Append a line to the APRS log box.

methods.name: set_monitor_active
methods.doc: Update the RX monitor status indicator label.

methods.name: set_input_level
methods.doc: Update input level indicator.

methods.name: set_output_level
methods.doc: Update TX level (future: drive a TX level indicator).

methods.name: push_waterfall
methods.doc: Feed audio samples to the waterfall widget if present.

methods.name: set_rx_clip
methods.doc: Show RX clip percentage.

methods.name: add_map_point
methods.doc: Add a station to the map.

methods.name: apply_profile
methods.doc: Load profile values — handles all APRS shared vars (took over from aprs_tab).

methods.name: collect_profile
methods.doc: Write widget values back into profile object.

classes.name: DownloadRegionDialog
classes.doc: Dialog for downloading OSM tiles for a lat/lon region offline.

methods.name: refresh_audio_devices

methods.name: append_log

functions.name: scrollable_frame
functions.doc: Return (canvas, scrollbar, inner_frame) for a scrollable tab.

classes.name: BoundedLog
classes.doc: ScrolledText that keeps at most max_lines lines to prevent memory growth.

classes.name: WaterfallCanvas
classes.doc: Rolling waterfall display. Call push_spectrum(row_array) to update.

methods.name: push_spectrum
methods.doc: Compute spectrum row from audio samples and push to waterfall.

classes.name: AprsMapCanvas

methods.name: _schedule_draw

files.module_doc: HAM HAT Control Center v4 - entry point.
Install core Python requirements and optional third-party SA818 tools.

functions.name: validate_offline_sources
functions.doc: Check that bundled snapshots exist.  Prints a warning for each that is absent. Returns a list of the missing names so the caller can decide whether to abort.

functions.name: copy_local_fallback
functions.doc: Copy bundled resource snapshots when offline. Returns list of names that were successfully copied.

files.module_doc: Capture audio from a selected input device and write a WAV — standalone subprocess worker.
Generate AI onboarding artifacts for this repository.
Deterministic mesh simulation tests (MESH-008).

classes.name: _Counts
classes.doc: Accumulates pass/fail counts for one test run without module-level mutation.

files.module_doc: Cross-platform bring-up validation script.

functions.name: check_display_env
functions.doc: Check X11/Wayland display environment on Linux/RPi (SKIP on macOS/Windows).

functions.name: check_scroll_bindings
functions.doc: Per-function source check: confirm Linux scroll bindings in widgets.py.

functions.name: check_launcher_scripts
functions.doc: Verify run_linux.sh and run_rpi.sh contain required safety items.

files.module_doc: Play WAV on a specific output device — standalone subprocess worker.

functions.name: _validate_output_device
functions.doc: Raise ValueError with a clear message if device_idx is not a usable output device.

functions.name: _load_wav_float32
functions.doc: Load WAV → float32 in [-1, 1].

files.module_doc: Capture audio and print a voice-activity score — standalone subprocess worker.

functions.name: voice_activity_score
functions.doc: Weighted combination of RMS energy and 95th-percentile amplitude.

files.module_doc: Cross-platform portability smoke test for HAM HAT Control Center v4.

functions.name: _check_sv_ttk_guard
functions.doc: sv_ttk should import or be set to None — never crash.

functions.name: _check_bleak_guard
functions.doc: bleak should import or be set to None — never crash.

functions.name: _check_scipy_guard
functions.doc: scipy is optional in aprs_modem — either path should work.

functions.name: _check_pycaw_guard
functions.doc: pycaw is Windows-only and should be silently absent elsewhere.

functions.name: _check_winsound_guard
functions.doc: winsound is Windows-only and guarded in audio_tools.

functions.name: _check_hardware_mode_switch
functions.doc: Save and reload a profile in each hardware mode; verify mode-specific fields persist and unrelated APRS/PTT fields are unaffected by the switch.

functions.name: _check_profile_field_clamping
functions.doc: _dict_to_profile must clamp numeric fields that are out of spec rather than raising an exception or silently storing garbage.

functions.name: _check_corrupt_profile_fallback
functions.doc: ProfileManager.load() must return None (not raise) for corrupt JSON, empty files, and truncated content — never crash the caller.

functions.name: _check_contacts_mesh_isolation
functions.doc: Verify that: 1. chat_contacts and chat_groups are normalised (strip + upper) on load.

files.module_doc: Two-radio APRS TX/RX reliability diagnostic.

functions.name: _validate_device
functions.doc: Raise ValueError with a clear message if device_idx is not a valid audio device for the requested direction.  Skips validation when device_idx is None (system default).

files.module_doc: Transmit a WAV file through SA818 with explicit PTT control — standalone worker.

functions.name: _load_wav_float32
functions.doc: Load WAV → float32 in [-1, 1].
